title: Sadanand Date takes charge as SEBI Executive Director, to oversee investigations
description: Sadanand S Date has taken charge as Executive Director at the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and will oversee the regulator’s Investigations Department, the market watchdog said in a press release on Friday.Date assumed office in Mumbai on March 4.An Indian Police Service (IPS) officer belonging to the 2007 batch from the Uttarakhand cadre, Date is joining SEBI after serving on central deputation with the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI).During his tenure with the CBI in Mumb
